# Workers AI Claude Desktop

- **OpenAPI Version:** `3.1.0`
- **API Version:** `v1`

Claude Desktop 3P gateway for Workers Ai Models

## Servers

- **URL:** `/v1`

## Operations

### POST /messages

- **Method:** `POST`
- **Path:** `/messages`

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`max_tokens` (required)**

  `integer` — The maximum number of tokens to generate before stopping.

- **`messages` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`content` (required)**

    `object`

  - **`role` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"user", "assistant", "system"`

- **`model` (required)**

  `string` — The model that will complete your prompt.

- **`cache_control`**

  `object`, default: `{"type":"ephemeral","ttl":"5m"}` — Top-level cache control automatically applies a cache\_control marker to the last cacheable block in the request.

  - **`ttl`**

    `string`, possible values: `"5m", "1h"`, default: `"5m"` — The time-to-live for the cache control breakpoint.

  - **`type`**

    `string`, possible values: `"ephemeral"`, default: `"ephemeral"`

- **`container`**

  `string` — Container identifier for reuse across requests.

- **`inference_geo`**

  `string` — Specifies the geographic region for inference processing. If not specified, the workspace's \`default\_inference\_geo\` is used.

- **`metadata`**

  `object` — An object describing metadata about the request.

  - **`user_id`**

    `string` — An external identifier for the user who is associated with the request.

- **`output_config`**

  `object`

  - **`effort`**

    `string`, possible values: `"low", "medium", "high"`

  - **`format`**

    `object`

    - **`properties` (required)**

      `object`

    - **`type` (required)**

      `string`, possible values: `"json_schema"`

- **`service_tier`**

  `string`, possible values: `"auto", "standard_only"` — Determines whether to use priority capacity (if available) or standard capacity for this request.

- **`stop_sequences`**

  `array` — Custom text sequences that will cause the model to stop generating.

  **Items:**

  `string`

- **`stream`**

  `boolean` — Whether to incrementally stream the response using server-sent events.

- **`system`**

  `object` — System prompt.

- **`temperature`**

  `number`, default: `1` — Amount of randomness injected into the response.

- **`thinking`**

  `object` — Configuration for enabling Claude's extended thinking.

- **`tool_choice`**

  `object`

- **`tools`**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`input_schema` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`type` (required)**

      `string`, possible values: `"object"`

    - **`properties`**

      `object`

    - **`required`**

      `array`

      **Items:**

      `string`

  - **`name` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`description`**

    `string`

- **`top_k`**

  `number`, default: `1` — Only sample from the top K options for each subsequent token.

- **`top_p`**

  `number`, default: `1` — Use nucleus sampling.

**Example:**

```json
{
  "max_tokens": 1,
  "messages": [
    {
      "content": "",
      "role": "user"
    }
  ],
  "model": "",
  "cache_control": {
    "type": "ephemeral",
    "ttl": "5m"
  },
  "container": "",
  "inference_geo": "",
  "metadata": {
    "user_id": ""
  },
  "output_config": {
    "effort": "low",
    "format": {
      "properties": {},
      "type": "json_schema"
    }
  },
  "service_tier": "auto",
  "stop_sequences": [
    ""
  ],
  "stream": true,
  "system": "",
  "thinking": null,
  "tool_choice": null,
  "tools": [
    {
      "name": "",
      "description": "",
      "input_schema": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": {},
        "required": [
          ""
        ]
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 200

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`content` (required)**

  `array` — Content generated by the model.

  **Items:**

  **One of:**

  - **`text` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`type` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"text"`

  - **`citations`**

    `array`

    **Items:**

  * **`thinking` (required)**

    `string`

  * **`type` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"thinking"`

  * **`signature`**

    `string`

  - **`data` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`type` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"redacted_thinking"`

  * **`id` (required)**

    `string`

  * **`input` (required)**

    `object`

  * **`name` (required)**

    `string`

  * **`type` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"tool_use"`

  * **`caller`**

    `object`

- **`id` (required)**

  `string`

- **`model` (required)**

  `string` — The model that will complete your prompt.

- **`role` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"assistant"` — Conversational role of the generated message.

- **`stop_reason` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"end_turn", "max_tokens", "stop_sequence", "tool_use", "pause_turn", "refusal"` — The reason that we stopped.

- **`stop_sequence` (required)**

  `string | null` — Which custom stop sequence was generated, if any.

- **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"message"`

- **`usage` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`cache_creation`**

    `object` — Breakdown of cached tokens by TTL

    - **`ephemeral_1h_input_tokens`**

      `integer`

    - **`ephemeral_5m_input_tokens`**

      `integer`

  - **`cache_creation_input_tokens`**

    `integer`

  - **`cache_read_input_tokens`**

    `integer`

  - **`inference_geo`**

    `string` — The geographic region where inference processing occurred.

  - **`input_tokens`**

    `integer`

  - **`output_tokens`**

    `integer`

- **`container`**

  `object`

  - **`expires_at` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`id` (required)**

    `string`

- **`stop_details`**

  `object`

  - **`category` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"cyber", "bio", "frontier_llm", "reasoning_extraction"`

  - **`explanation` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`type` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"refusal"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "",
  "container": {
    "id": "",
    "expires_at": ""
  },
  "content": [
    {
      "citations": [
        {}
      ],
      "text": "",
      "type": "text"
    }
  ],
  "model": "",
  "role": "assistant",
  "stop_details": {
    "category": "cyber",
    "explanation": "",
    "type": "refusal"
  },
  "stop_reason": "end_turn",
  "stop_sequence": null,
  "type": "message",
  "usage": {
    "cache_creation": null,
    "cache_creation_input_tokens": 0,
    "cache_read_input_tokens": 0,
    "inference_geo": "",
    "input_tokens": 0,
    "output_tokens": 0
  }
}
```

###### Content-Type: text/event-stream

**One of:**

- **`message` (required)**

  `object`

- **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"message_start"`

* **`delta` (required)**

  `object`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"message_delta"`

* **`usage`**

  `object`

  - **`cache_creation_input_tokens`**

    `integer`

  - **`cache_read_input_tokens`**

    `integer`

  - **`input_tokens`**

    `integer`

  - **`output_tokens`**

    `integer`

  - **`output_tokens_details`**

    `object`

    - **`thinking_tokens`**

      `integer`

- **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"message_stop"`

* **`content_block` (required)**

  `object`

* **`index` (required)**

  `integer`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"content_block_start"`

- **`delta` (required)**

  `object`

- **`index` (required)**

  `integer`

- **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"content_block_delta"`

* **`index` (required)**

  `integer`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"content_block_stop"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "message": {},
  "type": "message_start"
}
```

### GET /models

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/models`

#### Parameters

##### `after_id`

- **In:** `query`

ID of the object to use as a cursor for pagination. When provided, returns the page of results immediately after this object.

`string` — ID of the object to use as a cursor for pagination. When provided, returns the page of results immediately after this object.

##### `before_id`

- **In:** `query`

ID of the object to use as a cursor for pagination. When provided, returns the page of results immediately before this object.

`string` — ID of the object to use as a cursor for pagination. When provided, returns the page of results immediately before this object.

##### `limit`

- **In:** `query`

Number of items to return per page.

`integer`, default: `20` — Number of items to return per page.

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 The Models API response can be used to determine which models are available for use in the API. More recently released models are listed first.

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`data` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`capabilities` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`batch` (required)**

      `object`

      - **`supported` (required)**

        `boolean` — Whether this capability is supported by the model.

    - **`citations` (required)**

      `object`

      - **`supported` (required)**

        `boolean` — Whether this capability is supported by the model.

    - **`code_execution` (required)**

      `object`

      - **`supported` (required)**

        `boolean` — Whether this capability is supported by the model.

    - **`context_management` (required)**

      `object`

    - **`effort` (required)**

      `object`

    - **`image_input` (required)**

      `object`

      - **`supported` (required)**

        `boolean` — Whether this capability is supported by the model.

    - **`pdf_input` (required)**

      `object`

      - **`supported` (required)**

        `boolean` — Whether this capability is supported by the model.

    - **`structured_outputs` (required)**

      `object`

      - **`supported` (required)**

        `boolean` — Whether this capability is supported by the model.

    - **`thinking` (required)**

      `object`

  - **`created_at` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time` — RFC 3339 datetime string representing the time at which the model was released. May be set to an epoch value if the release date is unknown.

  - **`display_name` (required)**

    `string` — A human-readable name for the model.

  - **`id` (required)**

    `string` — Unique model identifier.

  - **`max_input_tokens` (required)**

    `integer | null` — Maximum input context window size in tokens for this model.

  - **`max_tokens` (required)**

    `integer | null` — Maximum value for the \`max\_tokens\` parameter when using this model.

  - **`type` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"model"` — For Models, this is always "model".

- **`first_id` (required)**

  `string` — First ID in the \`data\` list. Can be used as the \`before\_id\` for the previous page.

- **`has_more` (required)**

  `boolean` — Indicates if there are more results in the requested page direction.

- **`last_id` (required)**

  `string` — Last ID in the \`data\` list. Can be used as the \`after\_id\` for the next page.

**Example:**

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "type": "model",
      "id": "",
      "display_name": "",
      "created_at": "",
      "max_input_tokens": null,
      "max_tokens": null,
      "capabilities": null
    }
  ],
  "first_id": "",
  "has_more": true,
  "last_id": ""
}
```

## Schemas

### Message

- **Type:**`object`

* **`content` (required)**

  `array` — Content generated by the model.

  **Items:**

  **One of:**

  - **`text` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`type` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"text"`

  - **`citations`**

    `array`

    **Items:**

  * **`thinking` (required)**

    `string`

  * **`type` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"thinking"`

  * **`signature`**

    `string`

  - **`data` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`type` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"redacted_thinking"`

  * **`id` (required)**

    `string`

  * **`input` (required)**

    `object`

  * **`name` (required)**

    `string`

  * **`type` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"tool_use"`

  * **`caller`**

    `object`

* **`id` (required)**

  `string`

* **`model` (required)**

  `string` — The model that will complete your prompt.

* **`role` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"assistant"` — Conversational role of the generated message.

* **`stop_reason` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"end_turn", "max_tokens", "stop_sequence", "tool_use", "pause_turn", "refusal"` — The reason that we stopped.

* **`stop_sequence` (required)**

  `string | null` — Which custom stop sequence was generated, if any.

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"message"`

* **`usage` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`cache_creation`**

    `object` — Breakdown of cached tokens by TTL

    - **`ephemeral_1h_input_tokens`**

      `integer`

    - **`ephemeral_5m_input_tokens`**

      `integer`

  - **`cache_creation_input_tokens`**

    `integer`

  - **`cache_read_input_tokens`**

    `integer`

  - **`inference_geo`**

    `string` — The geographic region where inference processing occurred.

  - **`input_tokens`**

    `integer`

  - **`output_tokens`**

    `integer`

* **`container`**

  `object`

  - **`expires_at` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`id` (required)**

    `string`

* **`stop_details`**

  `object`

  - **`category` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"cyber", "bio", "frontier_llm", "reasoning_extraction"`

  - **`explanation` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`type` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"refusal"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "",
  "container": {
    "id": "",
    "expires_at": ""
  },
  "content": [
    {
      "citations": [
        {}
      ],
      "text": "",
      "type": "text"
    }
  ],
  "model": "",
  "role": "assistant",
  "stop_details": {
    "category": "cyber",
    "explanation": "",
    "type": "refusal"
  },
  "stop_reason": "end_turn",
  "stop_sequence": null,
  "type": "message",
  "usage": {
    "cache_creation": null,
    "cache_creation_input_tokens": 0,
    "cache_read_input_tokens": 0,
    "inference_geo": "",
    "input_tokens": 0,
    "output_tokens": 0
  }
}
```

### Container

- **Type:**`object`

* **`expires_at` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

* **`id` (required)**

  `string`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "",
  "expires_at": ""
}
```

### TextBlock

- **Type:**`object`

* **`text` (required)**

  `string`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"text"`

* **`citations`**

  `array`

  **Items:**

**Example:**

```json
{
  "citations": [
    {}
  ],
  "text": "",
  "type": "text"
}
```

### ThinkingBlock

- **Type:**`object`

* **`thinking` (required)**

  `string`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"thinking"`

* **`signature`**

  `string`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "signature": "",
  "thinking": "",
  "type": "thinking"
}
```

### RedactedThinkingBlock

- **Type:**`object`

* **`data` (required)**

  `string`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"redacted_thinking"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "data": "",
  "type": "redacted_thinking"
}
```

### ToolUseBlock

- **Type:**`object`

* **`id` (required)**

  `string`

* **`input` (required)**

  `object`

* **`name` (required)**

  `string`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"tool_use"`

* **`caller`**

  `object`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "id": "",
  "caller": {
    "type": "direct"
  },
  "input": {},
  "name": "",
  "type": "tool_use"
}
```

### DirectCaller

- **Type:**`object`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"direct"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "type": "direct"
}
```

### ServerToolCaller

- **Type:**`object`

* **`tool_id` (required)**

  `string`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"code_execution_20250825"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "tool_id": "",
  "type": "code_execution_20250825"
}
```

### ServerToolCaller20260120

- **Type:**`object`

* **`tool_id` (required)**

  `string`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"code_execution_20260120"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "tool_id": "",
  "type": "code_execution_20260120"
}
```

### RefusalStopDetails

- **Type:**`object`

* **`category` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"cyber", "bio", "frontier_llm", "reasoning_extraction"`

* **`explanation` (required)**

  `string`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"refusal"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "category": "cyber",
  "explanation": "",
  "type": "refusal"
}
```

### StopReason

- **Type:**`string`

The reason that we stopped.

**Example:**

### Usage

- **Type:**`object`

* **`cache_creation`**

  `object` — Breakdown of cached tokens by TTL

  - **`ephemeral_1h_input_tokens`**

    `integer`

  - **`ephemeral_5m_input_tokens`**

    `integer`

* **`cache_creation_input_tokens`**

  `integer`

* **`cache_read_input_tokens`**

  `integer`

* **`inference_geo`**

  `string` — The geographic region where inference processing occurred.

* **`input_tokens`**

  `integer`

* **`output_tokens`**

  `integer`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "cache_creation": {
    "ephemeral_1h_input_tokens": 0,
    "ephemeral_5m_input_tokens": 0
  },
  "cache_creation_input_tokens": 0,
  "cache_read_input_tokens": 0,
  "inference_geo": "",
  "input_tokens": 0,
  "output_tokens": 0
}
```

### CacheCreation

- **Type:**`object`

Breakdown of cached tokens by TTL

- **`ephemeral_1h_input_tokens`**

  `integer`

- **`ephemeral_5m_input_tokens`**

  `integer`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "ephemeral_1h_input_tokens": 0,
  "ephemeral_5m_input_tokens": 0
}
```

### RawMessageStreamEvent

- **Type:**

**Example:**

### RawMessageStartEvent

- **Type:**`object`

* **`message` (required)**

  `object`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"message_start"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "message": {},
  "type": "message_start"
}
```

### RawMessageDeltaEvent

- **Type:**`object`

* **`delta` (required)**

  `object`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"message_delta"`

* **`usage`**

  `object`

  - **`cache_creation_input_tokens`**

    `integer`

  - **`cache_read_input_tokens`**

    `integer`

  - **`input_tokens`**

    `integer`

  - **`output_tokens`**

    `integer`

  - **`output_tokens_details`**

    `object`

    - **`thinking_tokens`**

      `integer`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "delta": {},
  "type": "message_delta",
  "usage": {
    "cache_creation_input_tokens": 0,
    "cache_read_input_tokens": 0,
    "input_tokens": 0,
    "output_tokens": 0,
    "output_tokens_details": null
  }
}
```

### MessageDeltaUsage

- **Type:**`object`

* **`cache_creation_input_tokens`**

  `integer`

* **`cache_read_input_tokens`**

  `integer`

* **`input_tokens`**

  `integer`

* **`output_tokens`**

  `integer`

* **`output_tokens_details`**

  `object`

  - **`thinking_tokens`**

    `integer`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "cache_creation_input_tokens": 0,
  "cache_read_input_tokens": 0,
  "input_tokens": 0,
  "output_tokens": 0,
  "output_tokens_details": {
    "thinking_tokens": 0
  }
}
```

### OutputTokensDetails

- **Type:**`object`

* **`thinking_tokens`**

  `integer`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "thinking_tokens": 0
}
```

### RawMessageStopEvent

- **Type:**`object`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"message_stop"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "type": "message_stop"
}
```

### RawContentBlockStartEvent

- **Type:**`object`

* **`content_block` (required)**

  `object`

* **`index` (required)**

  `integer`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"content_block_start"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "content_block": {},
  "index": 0,
  "type": "content_block_start"
}
```

### RawContentBlockDeltaEvent

- **Type:**`object`

* **`delta` (required)**

  `object`

* **`index` (required)**

  `integer`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"content_block_delta"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "delta": {},
  "index": 0,
  "type": "content_block_delta"
}
```

### RawContentBlockDelta

- **Type:**`object`

**Example:**

```json
{}
```

### RawContentBlockStopEvent

- **Type:**`object`

* **`index` (required)**

  `integer`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"content_block_stop"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "index": 0,
  "type": "content_block_stop"
}
```

### MessageParam

- **Type:**`object`

* **`content` (required)**

  `object`

* **`role` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"user", "assistant", "system"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "content": "",
  "role": "user"
}
```

### ContentBlockParams

- **Type:**`array`

**Example:**

### ContentBlockParam

- **Type:**

**Example:**

### TextBlockParam

- **Type:**`object`

* **`text` (required)**

  `string`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"text"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "text": "",
  "type": "text"
}
```

### ImageBlockParam

- **Type:**`object`

* **`source` (required)**

  `object`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"image"`

* **`cache_control`**

  `object`, default: `{"type":"ephemeral","ttl":"5m"}` — Top-level cache control automatically applies a cache\_control marker to the last cacheable block in the request.

  - **`ttl`**

    `string`, possible values: `"5m", "1h"`, default: `"5m"` — The time-to-live for the cache control breakpoint.

  - **`type`**

    `string`, possible values: `"ephemeral"`, default: `"ephemeral"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "source": {
    "data": "",
    "media_type": "image/jpeg",
    "type": "base64"
  },
  "type": "image",
  "cache_control": {
    "type": "ephemeral",
    "ttl": "5m"
  }
}
```

### Base64ImageSource

- **Type:**`object`

* **`data` (required)**

  `string`

* **`media_type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"image/jpeg", "image/png", "image/gif", "image/webp"`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"base64"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "data": "",
  "media_type": "image/jpeg",
  "type": "base64"
}
```

### URLImageSource

- **Type:**`object`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"url"`

* **`url` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uri`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "type": "url",
  "url": ""
}
```

### CacheControlEphemeral

- **Type:**`object`

Top-level cache control automatically applies a cache\_control marker to the last cacheable block in the request.

- **`ttl`**

  `string`, possible values: `"5m", "1h"`, default: `"5m"` — The time-to-live for the cache control breakpoint.

- **`type`**

  `string`, possible values: `"ephemeral"`, default: `"ephemeral"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "type": "ephemeral",
  "ttl": "5m"
}
```

### DocumentBlockParam

- **Type:**`object`

* **`source` (required)**

  `object`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"document"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "source": {
    "data": "",
    "media_type": "application/pdf",
    "type": "base64"
  },
  "type": "document"
}
```

### Base64PDFSource

- **Type:**`object`

* **`data` (required)**

  `string`

* **`media_type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"application/pdf"`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"base64"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "data": "",
  "media_type": "application/pdf",
  "type": "base64"
}
```

### PlainTextSource

- **Type:**`object`

* **`data` (required)**

  `string`

* **`media_type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"text/plain"`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"text"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "data": "",
  "media_type": "text/plain",
  "type": "text"
}
```

### ContentBlockSource

- **Type:**`object`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"content"`

* **`content`**

  `object`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "content": null,
  "type": "content"
}
```

### URLPDFSource

- **Type:**`object`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"url"`

* **`url` (required)**

  `string`, format: `uri`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "type": "url",
  "url": ""
}
```

### Model

- **Type:**`string`

The model that will complete your prompt.

**Example:**

### Metadata

- **Type:**`object`

An object describing metadata about the request.

- **`user_id`**

  `string` — An external identifier for the user who is associated with the request.

**Example:**

```json
{
  "user_id": ""
}
```

### OutputConfig

- **Type:**`object`

* **`effort`**

  `string`, possible values: `"low", "medium", "high"`

* **`format`**

  `object`

  - **`properties` (required)**

    `object`

  - **`type` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"json_schema"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "effort": "low",
  "format": {
    "properties": {},
    "type": "json_schema"
  }
}
```

### ThinkingConfigParam

- **Type:**

Configuration for enabling Claude's extended thinking.

**Example:**

### ThinkingConfigEnabled

- **Type:**`object`

* **`budget_tokens` (required)**

  `integer` — Determines how many tokens Claude can use for its internal reasoning process. Larger budgets can enable more thorough analysis for complex problems, improving response quality.

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"enabled"`

* **`display`**

  `string`, possible values: `"summarized", "omitted"`, default: `"summarized"` — Controls how thinking content appears in the response. When set to \`summarized\`, thinking is returned normally. When set to \`omitted\`, thinking content is redacted but a signature is returned for multi-turn continuity.

**Example:**

```json
{
  "budget_tokens": 1024,
  "type": "enabled",
  "display": "summarized"
}
```

### ThinkingConfigDisabled

- **Type:**`object`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"disabled"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "type": "disabled"
}
```

### ThinkingConfigAdaptive

- **Type:**`object`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"adaptive"`

* **`display`**

  `string`, possible values: `"summarized", "omitted"`, default: `"summarized"` — Controls how thinking content appears in the response. When set to \`summarized\`, thinking is returned normally. When set to \`omitted\`, thinking content is redacted but a signature is returned for multi-turn continuity.

**Example:**

```json
{
  "type": "adaptive",
  "display": "summarized"
}
```

### ToolChoice

- **Type:**

**Example:**

### ToolChoiceAuto

- **Type:**`object`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"auto"`

* **`disable_parallel_tool_use`**

  `boolean`, default: `false` — Whether to disable parallel tool use.

**Example:**

```json
{
  "type": "auto",
  "disable_parallel_tool_use": false
}
```

### ToolChoiceAny

- **Type:**`object`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"any"`

* **`disable_parallel_tool_use`**

  `boolean`, default: `false` — Whether to disable parallel tool use.

**Example:**

```json
{
  "type": "any",
  "disable_parallel_tool_use": false
}
```

### ToolChoiceTool

- **Type:**`object`

* **`name` (required)**

  `string`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"tool"`

* **`disable_parallel_tool_use`**

  `boolean`, default: `false` — Whether to disable parallel tool use.

**Example:**

```json
{
  "name": "",
  "type": "tool",
  "disable_parallel_tool_use": false
}
```

### ToolChoiceNone

- **Type:**`object`

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"none"`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "type": "none"
}
```

### ModelInfo

- **Type:**`object`

* **`capabilities` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`batch` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`supported` (required)**

      `boolean` — Whether this capability is supported by the model.

  - **`citations` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`supported` (required)**

      `boolean` — Whether this capability is supported by the model.

  - **`code_execution` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`supported` (required)**

      `boolean` — Whether this capability is supported by the model.

  - **`context_management` (required)**

    `object`

  - **`effort` (required)**

    `object`

  - **`image_input` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`supported` (required)**

      `boolean` — Whether this capability is supported by the model.

  - **`pdf_input` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`supported` (required)**

      `boolean` — Whether this capability is supported by the model.

  - **`structured_outputs` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`supported` (required)**

      `boolean` — Whether this capability is supported by the model.

  - **`thinking` (required)**

    `object`

* **`created_at` (required)**

  `string`, format: `date-time` — RFC 3339 datetime string representing the time at which the model was released. May be set to an epoch value if the release date is unknown.

* **`display_name` (required)**

  `string` — A human-readable name for the model.

* **`id` (required)**

  `string` — Unique model identifier.

* **`max_input_tokens` (required)**

  `integer | null` — Maximum input context window size in tokens for this model.

* **`max_tokens` (required)**

  `integer | null` — Maximum value for the \`max\_tokens\` parameter when using this model.

* **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"model"` — For Models, this is always "model".

**Example:**

```json
{
  "type": "model",
  "id": "",
  "display_name": "",
  "created_at": "",
  "max_input_tokens": null,
  "max_tokens": null,
  "capabilities": {
    "batch": null,
    "citations": null,
    "code_execution": null,
    "context_management": null,
    "effort": null,
    "image_input": null,
    "pdf_input": null,
    "structured_outputs": null,
    "thinking": null
  }
}
```

### ModelCapabilities

- **Type:**`object`

* **`batch` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`supported` (required)**

    `boolean` — Whether this capability is supported by the model.

* **`citations` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`supported` (required)**

    `boolean` — Whether this capability is supported by the model.

* **`code_execution` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`supported` (required)**

    `boolean` — Whether this capability is supported by the model.

* **`context_management` (required)**

  `object`

* **`effort` (required)**

  `object`

* **`image_input` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`supported` (required)**

    `boolean` — Whether this capability is supported by the model.

* **`pdf_input` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`supported` (required)**

    `boolean` — Whether this capability is supported by the model.

* **`structured_outputs` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`supported` (required)**

    `boolean` — Whether this capability is supported by the model.

* **`thinking` (required)**

  `object`

**Example:**

```json
{
  "batch": {
    "supported": true
  },
  "citations": {
    "supported": true
  },
  "code_execution": {
    "supported": true
  },
  "context_management": {
    "clear_thinking_20251015": null,
    "clear_tool_uses_20250919": null,
    "compact_20260112": null
  },
  "effort": {
    "low": null,
    "medium": null,
    "high": null,
    "xhigh": null,
    "max": null
  },
  "image_input": {
    "supported": true
  },
  "pdf_input": {
    "supported": true
  },
  "structured_outputs": {
    "supported": true
  },
  "thinking": {
    "types": {
      "adaptive": null,
      "enabled": null
    }
  }
}
```

### CapabilitySupport

- **Type:**`object`

* **`supported` (required)**

  `boolean` — Whether this capability is supported by the model.

**Example:**

```json
{
  "supported": true
}
```
